hero.tagline: Pioneering AI in Procurement · Škoda Auto
hero.bio: I'm an AI Project Manager at Škoda Auto, where I drive the integration of artificial intelligence into procurement processes. With 13 years in procurement – including 8+ years leading IT tenders and hardware sourcing – I've developed a deep conviction: the future of purchasing is automated, intelligent, and human-centred. I believe in optimism, openness, and the power of connecting the right people.

about.label: About
about.title: Connecting people, technology, and procurement.
about.text: I'm an AI Project Manager at Škoda Auto, where I lead the integration of artificial intelligence into procurement processes. With over 13 years in procurement – including 8+ years leading IT and Connected Car tenders – I've developed a deep conviction: the future of purchasing is automated, intelligent, and human-centred. I believe in optimism, openness, and the power of connecting the right people.
